channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Artemis II Progress Bar - Mon Apr 13 01:14:51 UTC 2026
item.description:
Replaces IntelliJ's progress bar with a pixel-art Artemis II SLS rocket traveling through space toward the Moon. Determinate mode: the rocket travels left to right...
vendor: devbyaction downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.avoro.artemisiiprogressbar

item.title: SQL to Java - Sun Apr 12 21:29:10 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Huzefa Adil downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: no.huzef.blackhole.sql-to-java

item.title: QOI Image Support - Sun Apr 12 13:50:56 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: mububoki downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.mububoki.qoi-spi

item.description:
